entry.value:
{"viewModel":"siderbar","fullModeNewWindow":false,"skillIndex":{"skills":{"ltong-skills-v2":{"name":"ltong-skills-v2","description":"当用户涉及快手内部灵瞳(ltong)平台、UI操作等需求时，使用本技能。适用场景包括 一、任务数据查询：查询灵瞳(ltong)平台任务数据 二、工作流查询：查询灵瞳(ltong)平台现有的工作流，支持按名称查询和按创建人查询 三、创建任务：创建灵瞳(ltong)平台某个工作流对应的任务 四、创建工作流：以ltong标准工作流协议创建灵瞳(ltong)平台的工作流 触发关键词包括：灵瞳、ltong、LTong、UI自动化、AI-UI自动化
","source":"personal","status":"available","location":"/Users/lirxin/.codeflicker/skills/ltong-skills-v2/SKILL.md","directory":"/Users/lirxin/.codeflicker/skills/ltong-skills-v2","directoryTree":"ltong-skills-v2/
├── references/
│ ├── api-integration.md
│ ├── capabilities.md
│ ├── create-workflow.md
│ ├── node-info.md
│ └── update-workflow.md
└── SKILL.md","directoryTreeDepth":5.0,"userInvocable":true,"parsedAt":1.776704387348E12,"fileModifiedAt":1.775112896E12},"r2-tianwen-trace-query":{"name":"r2-tianwen-trace-query","description":"基于 R2 的天问 trace 链路查询技能。通过 R2 API 获取 traceId，使用 Playwright 在天问平台搜索，分析链路的上游、下游和中间件集群归属（HB1/HB2），支持预期集群比对。**触发条件：用户消息中包含"北驰"关键词时启用此技能。**","source":"personal","status":"available","location":"/Users/lirxin/.codeflicker/skills/r2-tianwen-trace-query/SKILL.md","directory":"/Users/lirxin/.codeflicker/skills/r2-tianwen-trace-query","directoryTree":"r2-tianwen-trace-query/
├── scripts/
│ └── query.py
└── SKILL.md","directoryTreeDepth":5.0,"allowedTools":"Bash, Python","userInvocable":true,"parsedAt":1.776704387348E12,"fileModifiedAt":1.7763299846425007E12},"skyfall-client-executor":{"name":"skyfall-client-executor","description":"天降回测执行器。其他 skill 调用时，接收本批次的 anchor_uid 列表（商家ID列表），根据 UID→工作流映射查找对应工作流，分配给本地设备并行执行，每台设备进入不同直播间。执行完成后收集所有结果并返回（含灵瞳任务ID和报告链接）。","source":"personal","status":"available","location":"/Users/lirxin/.codeflicker/skills/skyfall-client-executor/SKILL.md","directory":"/Users/lirxin/.codeflicker/skills/skyfall-client-executor","directoryTree":"skyfall-client-executor/
├── examples/
├── references/
├── scripts/
└── SKILL.md","directoryTreeDepth":5.0,"userInvocable":true,"parsedAt":1.776704387349E12,"fileModifiedAt":1.7766752632884397E12},"skyfall-regression-scheduler":{"name":"skyfall-regression-scheduler","description":"天降回测全流程调度器。当用户说"执行天降回测"、"开始天降自动化回测"、"跑天降回测"、"天降全流程回测"、"skyfall full regression"时触发。自动协调 skyfall-regression-task-queue（生成队列）、skyfall-task-executor（创建活动）、skyfall-client-executor（端上验证）三个 skill，按批次顺序执行完整回测流程：每批次并行创建活动 → 立即执行端上验证 → 等待上一批次所有端上任务完成 → 固定等待20分钟 → 立即开启下一批次，最终输出任务列表（含活动ID和灵瞳链接）。","source":"personal","status":"available","location":"/Users/lirxin/.codeflicker/skills/skyfall-regression-scheduler/SKILL.md","directory":"/Users/lirxin/.codeflicker/skills/skyfall-regression-scheduler","directoryTree":"skyfall-regression-scheduler/
└── SKILL.md","directoryTreeDepth":5.0,"userInvocable":true,"parsedAt":1.77670438735E12,"fileModifiedAt":1.7766748185816692E12},"skyfall-regression-task-queue":{"name":"skyfall-regression-task-queue","description":"天降回测任务队列生成助手。当用户说"生成天降回测任务"、"创建天降回测队列"、"天降自动化回测"、"skyfall regression"、"天降弹窗回测"、"小黄车回测"、"回测任务队列"时触发。依据 PRD 分析改动点，自动生成覆盖所有子活动类型、均匀分布单券/券包、按顺序分配主播的完整回测任务队列。","source":"personal","status":"available","location":"/Users/lirxin/.codeflicker/skills/skyfall-regression-task-queue/SKILL.md","directory":"/Users/lirxin/.codeflicker/skills/skyfall-regression-task-queue","directoryTree":"skyfall-regression-task-queue/
└── SKILL.md","directoryTreeDepth":5.0,"userInvocable":true,"parsedAt":1.77670438735E12,"fileModifiedAt":1.77659537130281E12},"skyfall-task-executor":{"name":"skyfall-task-executor","description":"天降任务执行器。当收到来自 skyfall-regression-task-queue 生成的任务节点文本（格式为"PRT环境创建天降活动..."），自动提取 query 内容并通过 POST 请求调用天降任务创建接口执行任务。触发条件：收到包含"PRT环境创建天降活动"的任务节点文本，或用户说"执行天降任务"、"发送天降请求"、"调用天降接口"时。","source":"personal","status":"available","location":"/Users/lirxin/.codeflicker/skills/skyfall-task-executor/SKILL.md","directory":"/Users/lirxin/.codeflicker/skills/skyfall-task-executor","directoryTree":"skyfall-task-executor/
└── SKILL.md","directoryTreeDepth":5.0,"userInvocable":true,"parsedAt":1.776704387351E12,"fileModifiedAt":1.7764976981507864E12},"code-review":{"name":"code-review","description":"代码审查助手，生成结构化的 Review Report。当用户说"Review 代码"、"Code Review"、"审查代码"、"检查代码变更"、"帮我看看这些改动"时触发。支持灵活定义审查范围（当前变更、指定目录、特定 commit 等）。","source":"internal","status":"available","location":"/Users/lirxin/.codeflicker/internal/skills/code-review/SKILL.md","directory":"/Users/lirxin/.codeflicker/internal/skills/code-review","directoryTree":"code-review/
├── references/
│ ├── edge-cases.md
│ ├── issue-categories.md
│ └── tool-guide.md
├── scripts/
│ ├── list-changed-files.sh
│ └── read-diff.sh
├── templates/
│ ├── report-template-en.md
│ └── report-template-zh.md
├── .version-1.0.0
└── SKILL.md","directoryTreeDepth":5.0,"userInvocable":true,"parsedAt":1.776704387352E12,"fileModifiedAt":1.774595279449414E12},"create-subagent":{"name":"create-subagent","description":"Create custom subagents for specialized AI tasks. Use when you want to create a new type of subagent, set up task-specific agents, configure code reviewers, debuggers, or domain-specific assistants with custom prompts.","source":"internal","status":"available","location":"/Users/lirxin/.codeflicker/internal/skills/create-subagent/SKILL.md","directory":"/Users/lirxin/.codeflicker/internal/skills/create-subagent","directoryTree":"create-subagent/
├── .version-1.0.0
└── SKILL.md","directoryTreeDepth":5.0,"userInvocable":true,"parsedAt":1.776704387353E12,"fileModifiedAt":1.7745070984637185E12},"find-skills":{"name":"find-skills","description":"Helps users discover and install agent skills when they ask questions like "how do I do X", "find a skill for X", "is there a skill that can...", or express interest in extending capabilities. This skill should be used when the user is looking for functionality that might exist as an installable skill.","source":"internal","status":"available","location":"/Users/lirxin/.codeflicker/internal/skills/find-skills/SKILL.md","directory":"/Users/lirxin/.codeflicker/internal/skills/find-skills","directoryTree":"find-skills/
├── .version-2.0.0
└── SKILL.md","directoryTreeDepth":5.0,"userInvocable":true,"parsedAt":1.776704387354E12,"fileModifiedAt":1.776672255561708E12},"help":{"name":"help","description":"This skill should be used when the user asks about CodeFlicker, CF, or kwaipilot features, usage, troubleshooting, or help. Triggers on keywords like "CodeFlicker", "CF", "kwaipilot", "帮助", "Help", "Help Hub", or when users ask how to use features, solve problems, or need product guidance. Provides access to the official CodeFlicker help documentation for answering user questions. Do NOT use for general programming questions unrelated to CodeFlicker product.","source":"internal","status":"available","location":"/Users/lirxin/.codeflicker/internal/skills/help/SKILL.md","directory":"/Users/lirxin/.codeflicker/internal/skills/help","directoryTree":"help/
├── scripts/
│ ├── update-docs.ps1
│ └── update-docs.sh
└── SKILL.md","directoryTreeDepth":5.0,"userInvocable":true,"parsedAt":1.77670438736E12,"fileModifiedAt":1.7766931241622534E12},"settings":{"name":"settings","description":"This skill should be used when the user asks to "view CodeFlicker settings", "get CodeFlicker configuration", "modify CodeFlicker config", "update CodeFlicker setting", "search CodeFlicker settings", "import session", "import conversation", "导入会话", "导入聊天", "查看 CodeFlicker 配置", "获取 CodeFlicker 设置", "修改 CodeFlicker 配置", "更新 CodeFlicker 设置", "搜索 CodeFlicker 配置", or discusses CodeFlicker/KwaiPilot extension configuration management, settings lookup, configuration modification, or session import from URL. Provides comprehensive guidance for managing CodeFlicker extension settings, including query, search, update operations, and session import via Debug Server API.","source":"internal","status":"available","location":"/Users/lirxin/.codeflicker/internal/skills/settings/SKILL.md","directory":"/Users/lirxin/.codeflicker/internal/skills/settings","directoryTree":"settings/
├── references/

├── .version-1.4.0
└── SKILL.md","directoryTreeDepth":5.0,"userInvocable":true,"parsedAt":1.77670438736E12,"fileModifiedAt":1.7766722555821543E12},"skill-manager":{"name":"skill-manager","description":"This skill should be used when the user asks to "create a skill", "update a skill", "delete a skill", "manage skills", "initialize skill git", "commit skill changes", "abstract a skill from conversation", "view local skills", "list available skills", "clone skill from git", "import skill from github", "import skill from gitlab", "publish skill", "share skill", "upload skill to CDN", "发布 skill", "分享技能", "上传 skill", or discusses CodeFlicker skill management, skill creation workflows, skill maintenance, skill organization, importing skills from remote git repositories, or publishing/sharing skills via CDN. Provides comprehensive guidance for creating, updating, deleting, git-managing, cloning from remote repositories, publishing to CDN, and organizing CodeFlicker skills throughout their entire lifecycle.","source":"internal","status":"available","location":"/Users/lirxin/.codeflicker/internal/skills/skill-manager/SKILL.md","directory":"/Users/lirxin/.codeflicker/internal/skills/skill-manager","directoryTree":"skill-manager/

│ ├── init-git.sh
│ ├── publish-skill.sh

└── SKILL.md","directoryTreeDepth":5.0,"userInvocable":true,"parsedAt":1.776704387361E12,"fileModifiedAt":1.7744416781814316E12}},"invalidSkills":[],"lastUpdatedAt":1.776704387361E12},"indexState":{"indexed":true,"indexing":false,"indexingProgress":1.0,"indexingMessage":"索引中: 索引任务执行完毕 ","lastBuildTime":"4-21-2026, 12:54:49 AM","pauseIndexManual":false,"status":"indexed"},"wikiState":{"indexing":false,"indexingProgress":1.0,"indexed":true,"indexingMessage":"项目 Wiki 生成完成","status":"indexed"},"codeSearchSelectOpenFileHistory":["src/main/java/com/kb/service/ChatService.java","src/main/java/com/kb/service/DocumentService.java","src/main/java/com/kb/service/RagService.java","src/main/java/com/kb/controller/DocumentController.java","src/main/java/com/kb/controller/ChatController.java","README.md","pom.xml","docker-compose.yml","src/main/java/com/kb/config/ChatModelConfig.java","src/main/java/com/kb/config/EmbeddingConfig.java","src/main/java/com/kb/config/VectorStoreConfig.java","src/main/java/com/kb/model/ChatRequest.java","src/main/java/com/kb/model/KbDocument.java"],"codeSearchSelectOpenDirHistory":["src/main/java/com/kb/service","src/main/java/com/kb/controller","","src/main/java/com/kb/config","src/main/java/com/kb/model"],"activeComposerSessionId":"3eypmj61zn9hzb225xq7"}
